alkylation reagent: alkylation by incubating samples in a 10 mM iodoacetamide solution
alkylation concentration: alkylation by incubating samples in a 10 mM iodoacetamide solution
cleavage agent: trypsin solution was then added to the samples
collision energy: fragmented by higher energy collisional dissociation (HCD) in the C-trap with a normalised collision energy of 28 eV
fragmentation method: fragmented by higher energy collisional dissociation (HCD)
instrument: coupled to a Q Exactive HF mass spectrometer
labeling: the viability of cells was estimated using the MTT test
reduction reagent: samples were incubated in a 5 mM DTT solution
reduction concentration: samples were incubated in a 5 mM DTT solution
